title: The Fifty-Fifty Girl
writer: Lloyd Corrigan, Ethel Doherty, John McDermott
actors: Bebe Daniels, James Hall, Harry T. Morey
plot: Strong-willed Kathleen O'Hara, believes in equality of sexes, makes a pact with her sweetheart, Jim Donahue, when they become joint owners of a California gold mine. According to the agreement, Donahue will do the housekeeping whi...
